subject: A large muscular orc-type figure stands with arms folded in a dimly lit cell or confined space hung with chains
description: A powerfully built humanoid figure with prominent lower tusks — clearly orc-type — stands in a small, harshly lit room. The figure is shirtless save for a studded leather vest, with arms folded tightly across their chest and wrists wrapped. Heavy chains hang from the walls and ceiling around them, with barbed wire visible on the right side of the frame. The walls are rough concrete or stone, bathed in a dramatic red-orange light from an unseen source below or to the side. The expression is stoic bordering on contemptuous — unmoved and watchful. The palette is almost entirely orange and dark teal-gray, a deliberately constrained and grim scheme.
foreground: muscular orc-type figure arms-folded in a chain-hung cell
background: rough stone walls with hanging chains and barbed wire, red-orange light
emotion: stoic defiance — arms crossed, contemptuous stare
